other_observers: Brandon Percival, John Drummond, Lisa Edwards, Kara Karragher, Maggie Boswell
description: The bird was never seen.  At about 8:40 it started calling from some distance, and I couldn't hear it.  Finally, at 9:05 pm it came rather close and sang vigorosly for 5 minutes.  I could hear it excellently, even with my diminished hearing.  Listening to the songs on ebird, the bird sounded just like Mexican, and not Eastern, Whip-poor-will.
